expected_use_case: Larger balanced LoRA training with 1,000 examples when Colab runtime duration and GPU memory are sufficient.
colab_gpu_note: Use a stable Colab GPU session. Consider 1 epoch first, then 2 epochs only if time permits.
notes: Do not claim this large config was trained unless a real run completes.
Adapter ZIP files are generated during training and should not be committed if large.
Fallback repair remains enabled even after training because small models can still produce invalid Mermaid syntax.
